arts.ttl: Arsenal begin talks over Cunha - Thursday's gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal begin talks over a move for Matheus Cunha, Julen Lopetegui's West Ham future is in the balance, while Harry Maguire is attracting Premier League interest.

arts.ttl: Intriguing Alisher Usmanov update as Dan Friedkin's Everton takeover moves forward
Arne Slot suffers huge blow for Everton clash as key Liverpool star suspended
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot will be forced into a change against Everton on Saturday with one of his key players picking up a ban after the Reds' draw at Newcastle

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche explains Everton changes and message to players before Wolves win
arts.sum: Everton ended a four-game without a goal to sweep aside Wolves 4-0 at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Dominic Calvert-Lewin cruel luck continues as Everton get future midfield hint
arts.sum: The Chris Beesley analysis after Everton record a huge Premier League victory 4-0 at home to Wolves

arts.ttl: Why will Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister miss Saturday's Merseyside derby against Everton?
arts.sum: Liverpool will be unable to call upon midfielder Alexis Mac Allister for Saturday's Merseyside derby against Everton at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: 'Sacked in the morning' - Wolves boss O'Neil under fire
arts.sum: Wolves fans turned on Gary O'Neil by chanting he should be "sacked in the morning", with the manager seemingly clinging to his job after a 4-0 thrashing at Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton stop five-match winless run with FOUR goals against Wolves
arts.sum: Everton had their third four minutes after half-time, Dawson netting the first of his two own goals as he battled with Calvert-Lewin from McNeil’s corner. Everton were off the mark after 10 minutes when Young curled a low free-kick around the Wolves wall and in at Jose Sa ’s near post.

arts.ttl: Gary O’Neil responds to ‘sack’ taunts from own fans as Wolves lose at Everton
arts.sum: Wolves were thrashed 4-0 by their fellow strugglers and O’Neil faced chants of ‘you’re getting sacked in the morning’ from the away end at Goodison

arts.sum: Arsenal begin talks over a move for Matheus Cunha, Julen Lopetegui's West Ham future is in the balance, while Harry Maguire is attracting Premier League interest.
